---
name: Develop
description: This is to be used when making changes to the project
argument-hint: "Implement"
---

Follow the guidelines [Instructions](copilot-instructions.md)
Understand the Architecture  [Architecture](../../Architecture.md)
Update ReadMe if changes are made that affects use [ReadMe](../../README.md)
Specs for features are to be added to the [Specs](../SpecDocs) folder and linked in the ReadMe if needed
Update Architecture when done if needed
## All features must be implemented in a branch and merged via PR
## Always write test before implementation,
## Tests must always fail before implementation is writen
## Tests are not to be altered during implementation phase
## Always check if the soltion builds post implementation 
## Always run the tests post changes if any fail correct the implementation not the test
